# Florida Coastal Prep Sports Academy

> Florida Coastal Prep (FCP) is a post-graduate and high school basketball academy located at 33 Jet Drive NW, Fort Walton Beach, FL 32548. Founded by Lee DeForest, FCP has developed college athletes from 43 states and 22 countries since 2019. Phone: 850-961-2323. Email: info@floridacoastalprep.com. The academy competes nationally in the SEHAL and PHSBA circuits and has produced alumni who have reached the NBA, NBA G-League, D1, D2, NAIA, and JUCO programs.

## Programs

- [Post-Graduate Program](https://floridacoastalprep.com/post-grad/): One-year post-graduate basketball program for players who have completed high school and are seeking to improve their game, earn college scholarships, or play at a higher level. Features NBA-level coaching, SEHAL and PHSBA national competition, film production, and full recruiting support. Players from 43 states and 22 countries have trained here since 2019.
- [High School Program](https://floridacoastalprep.com/high-school/): National high school basketball academy for grades 9–12 combining two-a-day court sessions, NCAA-approved academics, strength and conditioning, and a national game schedule of up to 30 games per season. All games are professionally filmed and uploaded to YouTube for recruiting exposure.
- [Why Post-Graduate?](https://floridacoastalprep.com/why-post-grad/): Overview of what a post-graduate basketball year is, who it is for, and how it helps players earn college scholarships and improve their recruiting profile.

## Facility

- [Spartan Training Center](https://floridacoastalprep.com/training/): 14,000 sq ft training facility featuring professional hardwood courts, a turf performance zone, weight room, and film room with 24/7 access in Fort Walton Beach, FL.
- [Housing](https://floridacoastalprep.com/housing/): Supervised team housing on Florida's Emerald Coast with a live-in house coach, daily meals, and structured routines. Located near the beach in Fort Walton Beach.

## Academics

- [Academics](https://floridacoastalprep.com/academics/): NCAA-approved academic program with accredited coursework, college credit options through Colorado Christian University, and dual enrollment for high school students. Designed to keep athletes academically eligible and college-ready.

## Coaches & Staff

- [Coaches](https://floridacoastalprep.com/coaches/): Coaching staff includes former NBA players and Division I coaches. Key staff: Lee DeForest (Founder & Director), Rico Overall (Director of Recruiting), Vando Becheli (National Post-Grad Director), Dada Huang (International Recruiter), Tyler Martin (Head Skill Development Coach).

## Results & Alumni

- [Spartan Alumni](https://floridacoastalprep.com/commitments/): Full list of FCP alumni who have earned college scholarships or professional contracts. Notable alumni include Sean East II (University of Missouri → NBA G-League → NBA), Nathan Mariano (4x NBB Champion → Phoenix Suns), Ring Malith (SIU Edwardsville, D1 Class of 2024). Alumni have signed at D1, D2, NAIA, and JUCO programs across the country.

## Apply & Tuition

- [Apply](https://floridacoastalprep.com/apply/): Application page for prospective student-athletes. Roster spots are limited. US and international applications accepted.
- [Tuition](https://floridacoastalprep.com/tuition/): Program fees, tuition rates, and payment information for both post-graduate and high school programs.
- [Make a Payment](https://floridacoastalprep.com/payment/): Secure online payment portal for enrolled students. Not intended for public search traffic.

## About & Contact

- [About FCP](https://floridacoastalprep.com/about/): History, mission, and founding story of Florida Coastal Prep. Includes ESPN Director of Recruiting Paul Biancardi's endorsement.
- [FAQ](https://floridacoastalprep.com/faq/): Frequently asked questions covering admissions, academics, housing, tuition, recruiting, and daily life at FCP.
- [Contact](https://floridacoastalprep.com/contact/): Contact Florida Coastal Prep at info@floridacoastalprep.com or 850-961-2323. Address: 33 Jet Drive NW, Fort Walton Beach, FL 32548. Hours: Mon–Fri 8AM–5PM, Sat 8AM–1PM.

## News & Blog

- [Blog](https://floridacoastalprep.com/blog/): News, recruiting updates, alumni success stories, and basketball development articles written by FCP coaching staff.

## Media

- [Docuseries](https://floridacoastalprep.com/docuseries/): "6 Months to Change Everything" — original docuseries following FCP athletes through a full season of training, competition, and recruiting. Hundreds of thousands of views on YouTube.
